title: [cross-impl] unresolved merge conflict in schnorr48.c
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c contains unresolved git merge conflict markers (around lines 271-275, 404-408 for seqnum/header_len comments). This can cause inconsistent build behavior or incorrect transcript construction between Rust/Python and Zephyr C impls. Affects frame signing/verification consistency for same algorithm. Must clean conflicts and verify against schnorr48.json vectors. Related to worker merges in recent commits.
close_reason: Cleaned merge conflict markers and comments in schnorr48_sign_frame/verify_frame; removed conflicting seqnum/header_len comments; verified transcript matches Rust/Python via cross-language oracle in test; commit cf5d3d891
